title: Beauty Advisor
description:
As a Chanel Beauty Advisor, you enjoy using your passion in beauty and Chanel’s vast product offerings to help your clients achieve their ideal skin. You build strong relationships with your many clients in the neighborhood, who often visit the boutique over the weekend to buy products and share news about their lives. You take pride in giving honest and trustworthy advice to every client and that professionalism has gained you many loyal clients over the years.


If you are a beauty fanatic who is passionate about fragrance, makeup and skincare, we would like to speak with you! You will join our team of Beauty Advisors to co-create stories with and for your clients and come up with unique moments made just for them. As the Front Face of Chanel, you will play a critical role in creating a unique and unforgettable experience for each client, at every moment and at every point of sales.

As our Beauty Advisor, you can look forward to excellent career growth and advancement opportunities within the boutique team in specialist or management positions across the House.


Leveraging your unique experiences, Chanel will enable you to…

  • Inspire and bring out the best in your clients with our products
  • Provide a unique beauty experience for your clients with our vast product offerings
  • Be part of a collaborative and inclusive team
  • Demonstrate your passion and knowledge in Fragrance, Makeup or Skincare
  • Develop strong, lasting relationships with clients

You are energized by…

  • Demonstrating high professional standards, personal commitment and passion for the brand
  • Working in a highly collaborative and fast-paced environment
  • Fostering meaningful client experience and building client networks
  • Keeping yourself updated with latest trends and innovation in the world of Beauty
  • Trying new approaches to tackle own work and opportunities to learn new knowledge and skills

What you can bring to the team…

  • Excellent communication and relationship building skills
  • Passion for Fragrance, Makeup or Skincare
  • Fast-paced and collaborative working style
  • Creativity in your ways of working
  • Knowledge of beauty trends

At CHANEL, we believe the uniqueness of each individual increases the diversity and vibrancy of our teams, and we foster an inclusive culture so that everyone can perform at their best. We strongly encourage your application, and value the perspective and experience you can bring to CHANEL.

postedCompany.description:
Chanel is a world leader in creating, manufacturing and distributing luxury products, including Ready-to-Wear, Accessories, Fragrances, Makeup, Skincare, Jewellery and Watches. Founded by Gabrielle Chanel in 1910, the House remains dedicated to quality craftsmanship and offering high-end creations. At present, Chanel employs more than 32,000 people worldwide.


As an independent company, its core values are grounded in:

  • Exceptional creation and client experience
  • Nurturing human potential
  • Having a positive impact – on people, the environment and communities around the world.

As part of this, the House promotes arts, culture and creativity, while investing significantly in key areas including research & development, sustainability, and innovation.


Chanel is dedicated to creating the conditions for people to perform at their best, building on their strengths and enabling them to benefit from new opportunities. It offers a unique working environment where people are given time to understand the brand, the business, and develop their personal motivations. This means everyone can grow, continue to be inspired and feel included, now and in the future. The company fosters true collaboration and respect for all, grounded in the belief that diversity is essential to the success of the organisation and its people.


Chanel remains committed to rewarding people competitively, as well as offering initiatives such as wellbeing programmes, learning and development opportunities, and parental leave for all parents globally.
postedCompany.name: CHANEL PTE LIMITED
